The Artist

Crafted with
Precision & Passion

Inkthony is a licensed Cuban tattoo artist based in Las Vegas, Nevada, operating out of Blood & Gold Tattoo IV. With deep roots in the Latin artistic tradition, his work blends photorealistic portraiture, black & grey mastery, and bold illustrative design.

From full sleeves and leg pieces to delicate fine-line work, every tattoo is a collaborative story — tailored to your vision, executed with surgical detail.

10+
Years Experience
500+
Pieces Completed
100%
Licensed & Insured
Start Your Journey

Portfolio

The Work

What We Offer

Services

🖤
Black & Grey Realism

Photorealistic portraits, statues, and scenes rendered in breathtaking black and grey. Inkthony's signature style.

From $200 / hr
🌹
Full Sleeves & Leg Pieces

Large-scale compositions that tell a cohesive visual story across your arm or leg. Multiple sessions, flawless execution.

Custom Quote
✨
Fine Line & Minimalist

Delicate line work, floral designs, and small-scale art for those seeking subtle elegance with lasting impact.

From $150 / piece
🎨
Color & Illustrative

Bold color work, Chicano-influenced designs, and illustrative pieces that pop with personality and culture.

From $200 / hr
🔄
Cover-Ups & Reworks

Transform an old tattoo into something new. Full consultations to design a solution that exceeds expectations.

Consultation Required
👁️
Custom Designs

Bring your vision or let Inkthony create from scratch. Every design is original — never traced, never templated.

Free Consultation

Ready to Get Inked?

Book Your Session

Fill out the form below and Inkthony will get back to you within 24–48 hours to confirm your appointment and discuss your design. For urgent inquiries, call (702) 964-9109.

⚡ A $50–$100 deposit may be required to secure your appointment date. By submitting you agree to our cancellation policy (48hr notice required).

🖤
Request Received!

Thanks for reaching out. Inkthony will contact you within 24–48 hours to confirm your appointment and next steps. In the meantime, follow on Instagram or TikTok for the latest work.
